display.name: Roadside Cutpurses
display.short_description: Three road-cutters drift out of the brush with palms up and knives low. They want something easy before the next patrolless mile.

choices.label: Throw them a ration and back away
choices.summary: Let them tear into your trail food while you keep your skin and your pace.

choices.label: Rush the knife hand
choices.summary: Break their nerve fast or take a cut for getting too close.
